assignments.title: Lab A — Suspicious Login Risk Score
assignments.description: Explainable risk score over a 14-day auth log; tune a threshold to a ≤10/day alert budget and evaluate with precision/recall.

assignments.title: Cost Simulator
assignments.description: Configure usage and user growth assumptions, then compare monthly and total cost across selected LLM models.

assignments.title: Hello Apps
assignments.description: A trio of 'Hello' apps — Hello World, Hello Chat, and Hello Hume — each with a unique theme, combined into one tabbed interface.
